now.title: Current moment
now.playerSummary: The harbor is uneasy, the watch is stretched thin, and too many rumors point toward the old ruins.
now.gmTruth: The Cinder Choir is using the unrest to hide ritual logistics while the harbor master suppresses the missing-person reports.

threads.title: Ashes in the Chapel
threads.hook: Fine ash keeps appearing in the chapel even after the fire was contained.
threads.playerSummary: The chapel remains closed after a suspicious fire and a handful of whispered sightings.
threads.gmTruth: The ash is residue from failed rehearsal rites in the crypt.

threads.title: Silent Bell Ledger
threads.hook: A courier ledger maps hidden payments and meeting routes.
threads.playerSummary: GM-only courier routes are still hidden from the players.
threads.gmTruth: The ledger reveals how the cult's harbor cells coordinate every public disruption.

threads.title: Dockworkers Oath
threads.playerSummary: A labor pledge briefly stabilized the docks before fear took over again.
threads.gmTruth: The pledge failed after the union leadership was blackmailed.

threads.title: Lantern Broker's Warning
threads.playerSummary: A broker warns that blue lanterns mark safe routes and amber lanterns mark traps.
threads.gmTruth: Sera is feeding selective truths in exchange for immunity after the crackdown.

threads.title: Night Watch Vanishes
threads.hook: A patrol disappears after following lantern lights toward the sea caves.
threads.playerSummary: The watch lost contact with an entire patrol near the low-tide tunnels.
threads.gmTruth: The patrol found a ritual staging point and was captured alive for leverage.

threads.title: Stolen Reliquary
threads.hook: An empty reliquary was recovered with fresh wax seals.
threads.playerSummary: Someone swapped a chapel relic and left behind fresh ritual wax.
threads.gmTruth: The stolen relic is the final focus item for the Cinder Choir's harbor rite.

threads.title: Tidegate Informant
threads.hook: An informant wants safe passage in exchange for patrol logs.
threads.playerSummary: A dockside informant claims patrol schedules are being sold before each disappearance.
threads.gmTruth: A frightened signalman from the Tidegate tower has been feeding schedules to Choir intermediaries under threat.

threads.title: Whispers in the Harbor
threads.hook: Dockworkers have started refusing night shifts.
threads.playerSummary: Dockworkers say someone is paying for silence at the piers.
threads.gmTruth: Vel has been paid to redirect patrol routes and bury the first reports.

patterns.title: Ash and Ritual
patterns.summary: The chapel fire, relic theft, and strange ash all point to ritual preparation close to the city center.

patterns.title: Harbor Conspiracy
patterns.summary: The docks are being manipulated so disappearances look like labor unrest instead of coordinated pressure.

patterns.title: Lantern Routes
patterns.summary: Lantern codes, safe approaches, and trap routes are quietly shaping who reaches the ruins alive.

patterns.title: Silent Bell Network
patterns.summary: A hidden courier network is moving coded orders under the cover of dockside chaos.
